meaning: adj.可认识的,可辨认的,可公认的,可认知的
examples: When the elephant was found by the park staff, he was barely recognizable.
Despite these vague categories, one should not claim unequivocally that hostility between recognizable classes cannot be legitimately observed.
Here, the campus of the Massachusetts Institute for Technology is recognizable by its classical architecture.
Rock-A-Bye Baby features recognizable music from nearly 30 artists, from Metallica to the Rolling Stones.
